zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Spalding於大約1300年出生在英國。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1360年享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Spalding于大约1300年出生在英国。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1360年享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Spalding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (Angus): variant of   Spaulding  .

History: The surname was taken to Scotland in the 13th century by Radulphus de Spalding. His descendants prospered, and the name is still common in Scotland. Early American Spaldings include Thomas Spalding, born in Frederica, GA, in 1774, who introduced sea-island cotton in GA, and the physician Lyman Spalding, born in Cornish, NH, in 1775, who founded US Pharmacopoeia.

variants.name: Spaulding
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire) and English (Cambridgeshire and Norfolk): habitational name from Spalding (Lincolnshire), from Old English Spaldas, the name of an Anglian tribe who settled chiefly in the fen-lands of Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire, + the groupname suffix -ingas. Compare Spafford .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Spalding was born about 1300, in England. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1360, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Spalding est né environ 1300, à Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1360, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Spalding wurde um 1300 in England geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1360 im Alter von 61 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Spalding è nato il circa 1300 nel England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1360, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Spaldingは約1300年にイギリスで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1360年に61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Spalding(은)는 대략 1300년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1360년 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Spalding nasceu aproximadamente 1300, em Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1360, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Spalding родился около 1300 г. в местности Англия. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1360 г. в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Spalding nació aproximadamente 1300, en Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1360, a la edad de 61 años.
